Welcome

Fresh Food,
Great Atmosphere

Blou Kombuis is a beloved restaurant in Riverside, near Mossel Bay — serving fresh seafood, hearty mains, and delicious platters in a warm and relaxed setting.

With a fireplace for cosy evenings and a menu packed with flavour, we are the perfect spot for any occasion.

Seafood Steaks Platters Kids Menu Fireplace Dine In
